stories.intro: US and Iran on the brink

stories.intro: Poor nations pay debt over schools
stories.body: Developing countries now spend more repaying foreign creditors than on educating their citizens, a UN report reveals, exposing how a spiraling debt crisis compounded by aid cuts is mortgaging the futures of
